message:
Here's a tiny piece of technology that brings families back together: the humble microchip. 🐱💛

Story after story proves it. Cats who slip out a door and vanish for weeks — even months — get reunited with their people again and again, all because a shelter or vet was able to scan a rice-grain-sized chip and find a phone number that still worked.

A collar can slip off. A scared cat can run far. A microchip stays put — but only does its job if the details behind it are current. So this is your friendly nudge:

✅ If your cat isn't chipped, ask your vet at the next visit — it's quick and inexpensive.
✅ If your cat IS chipped, take two minutes to confirm your phone number and address are up to date in the registry.

It's one of the simplest things you can do to make sure a wandering cat always has a way home. 🏡

Is your cat microchipped? 🐾
